title: Updates via Email: For Mobile
excerpt: I appreciate the Monday.com updates via email pulse feature, but I face a challenge when working from my phone on the go. There’s currently no option to access the pulse link on mobile, which means I can’t easily respond…

posts.author: braxwrn (Braxton Warren)
posts.cookedHtml: I appreciate the Monday.com updates via email pulse feature, but I face a challenge when working from my phone on the go. There’s currently no option to access the pulse link on mobile, which means I can’t easily respond to emails related to Monday.com while away from my computer. Adding a button in the mobile app to access the pulse link would greatly improve the mobile user experience and allow for more convenient interactions with email updates on the platform.

posts.author: trmg1 (Tristan Rogers)
posts.cookedHtml: Encountered this same roadblock today on iPadOS. I am running a business on the go and need the same functionality from the desktop and webapp versions of Monday when I’m with clients or travelling.

posts.author: LaKno (Lara)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a good point. It’s definitely a common pain point for anyone who relies on monday for crucial updates and needs to stay responsive while on the go. I completely agree – having a pulse link access within the mobile app would significantly enhance the user experience and streamline workflows. Are there any news at all if this is in progress?
